items.headline_en: llama.cpp release feed now shows b8949
items.summary_en: The monitored release feed for llama.cpp changed and the newest visible tag is b8949. The feed timestamp is 2026-04-27T16:51:14Z. This looks like a release-level update rather than a cosmetic page edit.
items.evidence_excerpt: title=b8949 updated=2026-04-27T16:51:14Z link=https://github.com/ggml-org/llama.cpp/releases/tag/b8949 summary= content=fix: rpc-server cache may not work in Windows environments ( #22394 ) fix: create directory and log cache file name. Remove GGML_LOG_INFO conditional compilation. Co-authored-by: kotaro kotaro.kusunoki@gmail.com macOS/iOS: macOS Apple Silicon (arm64) macOS Apple Silicon (arm64, KleidiAI enabled) macOS Intel (x64) iOS XCFramework Linux: Ubuntu x64 (CPU) Ubuntu arm64 (CPU) Ubuntu s390x (CPU) Ubuntu x64 (Vulkan) Ubuntu arm64 (Vulkan) Ubuntu x64 (ROCm 7.2) Ubuntu x64 (OpenVINO) Ubuntu x64 (SYCL FP32) Ubuntu x64 (SYCL FP16) Android: Android arm64 (CPU) Windows: Windows x64 (CPU) Windows arm64 (CPU) Windows x64 (CUDA 12) - CUDA 12.4 DLLs Windows x64 (CUDA 13) - CUDA 13.1 DLL...
